g.text: cgroup v2 Container Directory Layout (Virtual Memory View)

ul.li: Addressing: Offsets follow Base + Offset convention. Total mapped range shown: 16KB.
Cache Line Alignment: Configuration files controllers and subtree_control are 64B-aligned to prevent false sharing during directory traversal.
Page Isolation: Heavy metric files like memory.stat and cpu.stat are allocated on dedicated 4KB pages to optimize TLB caching for high-frequency reads.
Growth Logic: Metadata is fixed at page start; dynamic extensions or child group descriptors utilize the Green (0x3020+) region.
